base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of copyright_line_1985_2010 — a ui (menu_screen) from 1985 super mario bros. '©1985-2010 NINTENDO' copyright notice + '25th Anniversary Copyright' — appears at bottom of title screen. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: '©1985-2010 NINTENDO' copyright notice + '25th Anniversary Copyright' — appears at bottom of title screen; persistent text atlas render
